name: Ahmed Bilal
title: Senior Software Engineer / Full-Stack Engineer
summary: Senior full-stack engineer with 5+ years of experience in developing high-performance fintech and AI applications. Proven expertise in Angular, React.js, Node.js, FastAPI, event-driven microservices, Nx monorepo architecture, and automated QA frameworks. Experienced in designing scalable, secure, and maintainable systems with strong frontend/backend ownership and DevOps expertise.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
achievements: Architected and led frontend development of CIBC/Simplii Digital Core Banking platform, enabling account opening, mortgage onboarding, and AML/CAMLR compliance workflows.
Built Nx monorepo architecture and enterprise design system supporting dynamic multi-step onboarding journeys with bilingual localization.
Implemented role-based task dashboards and exception-handling workflows for human-in-the-loop resolution of eligibility, AML, and API failures.
Integrated external systems including Canada Post API for address validation and backend services for eligibility checks.
Developed multi-step, API-driven forms with real-time validation, conditional logic, and workflow rehydration for partially failed onboarding flows.
Led frontend team, enforced coding standards, and collaborated with PMs and backend engineers to deliver regulated fintech solutions.
Modernized legacy ISBO onboarding system for CIBC/Simplii, replacing batch-based processing with real-time microservices, MongoDB Change Streams, and Solace messaging.
Built backend orchestration for GIC/Student Deposit recovery, event-driven state transitions, and async workflows, improving processing latency by 50%.
Owned CI/CD setup via Jenkins, environment promotion, deployment troubleshooting, and runtime log monitoring for high reliability.
Delivered Lucky Mobility Activation as a reusable React/TypeScript widget with a clean host integration contract, supporting 6-7 step activation flows and bilingual localization.
Implemented scalable Redux + RxJS epic architecture orchestrating OAuth, order initiation, submit/quit flows, session-timeout recovery, and global loading/error handling.
Built end-to-end local testing using a comprehensive Express mock API, improving reliability and developer efficiency.
Designed and implemented AgentQA, a cloud-native QA platform for automated testing of chatbots/conversational AI, supporting deterministic, LLM-based, and custom metrics evaluation.
Developed backend using Node.js/Express and PostgreSQL/MSSQL with Sequelize ORM for immutable/versioned test runs and multi-turn conversational evaluation.
Built async execution workers using BullMQ + Redis and Solace for high-volume test orchestration with snapshot-based result integrity.
Created frontend dashboards (Next.js SPA) for datasets, scenarios, test cases, and results inspection with conversation transcripts, evaluation matrices, and attachment/log viewers.
Integrated platform with CI/CD, secure session handling, and Azure Key Vault secrets for enterprise-grade deployment and operational reliability.
Developed FastAPI middleware microservice for FX chatbot interactions from Microsoft Teams, managing session state, multi-turn conversations, and metadata extraction.
Implemented async state machine workflows for commentary blasts, including draft handling, confirmation flows, and Redis-based flag management for reliability.
Orchestrated scalable deployments via Docker/Kubernetes, handling retries, logging, and error recovery for real-time financial messaging.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
achievements: Led Angular migration from 2+ to latest version, improving system stability, maintainability, and performance by 25-30%.
Refactored codebase per John Papa guidelines, implementing clean architecture and test-driven development.
Developed frontend features in collaboration with designers, optimizing UI/UX and implementing responsive, accessible web components.

education.institution: National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences
